name: farming_2_watercolor_pastoral
principle: Style is frozen; scene is free. Reuse this capsule to keep Farming 2 watercolor assets visually consistent while changing subject, layout, or scene.

palette.skin: soft peach with warm rosy cheeks
palette.accent: small honey yellow or muted garden tones

line_quality: confident but not clean vector outlines
thin imperfect circle when a portrait frame is needed
avoid: tiny decorative details near the face

favicon_small.goal: Keep the farmer readable at 16px and 32px while retaining the garden and bee as Farming brand cues at larger app-icon sizes.
composition_rules: face, eyes, smile, cheeks, and straw hat must be readable as simple shapes
use a tighter crop for browser favicons and the complete garden composition for installed app icons
keep the expression simple and cute
favor broad color blocks over watercolor detail
keep the bee and flower accents when the output size can render them clearly
favicon_small.prompt_addendum: Make the face and straw hat dominant. Use a very thin, uneven, partially broken warm gray pencil circle if a frame is needed. Keep only four readable color blocks: honey-yellow hat, peach face, soft brown hair, muted sage clothing. Almost no background details.

illustration_large.goal: Carry Farming 2's pastoral watercolor brand feeling in docs, product pages, and larger visual scenes.
composition_rules: allow small bees, wildflowers, vines, paths, wooden hives, and gentle garden scenery
keep the scene airy with white paper breathing room
use decorative detail only where it will remain visible at the intended size
preserve the loose ink and transparent watercolor feeling
illustration_large.prompt_addendum: Use a cozy hand-drawn bee garden atmosphere with loose black ink line art, soft transparent watercolor washes, honey yellow accents, muted sage greens, wildflowers, wooden hives, and warm paper texture.

saved_references.role: large illustration and brand mood reference
